title: How to Design an Automated Warehouse for Thousands of SKUs?
summary:
Designing an automated warehouse requires more than selecting equipment.

Companies must consider:
SKU characteristics
Storage strategy
Order patterns
Warehouse layout
Future expansion

This article explains how businesses should plan a high SKU automated warehouse.

technology: Automated Warehouse Design with Mini Load ASRS

Low storage efficiency
Poor workflow
Future expansion limitations

contentHtml:
Project Overview

A warehouse is not just a storage building.

It is a critical part of the supply chain.

Key Points

  • Design before equipment selection
  • Consider future growth
  • Optimize workflow first

Implementation & Workflow

Requirement analysis → Simulation → Layout design → Equipment selection → Installation

Customer Value & Results

Better planning reduces:

Investment waste
Operational problems
Future reconstruction costs

Conclusion

A well-designed automated warehouse creates long-term operational advantages.
